generator_used: OpenAI built-in image_gen with source-backed official IKEA product references
source_method: OpenAI built-in image_gen compositing used the current official IKEA ALPSTUGA product packshot as the authoritative hardware reference and an official IKEA lifestyle photograph as a scale and material reference
post_processing: No local rendering or deterministic Pillow fallback was used; ImageMagick was used only to create a temporary 16:9 inspection crop, not to alter the published cover
